hero_product_name: the real AnyWell powered wheelchair matched from the white-background reference photos
campaign_goal: Re-run AnyWell emotional campaign clips with the real wheelchair identity preserved through white-background product references while still delivering remote live-action video clips.
target_audience: Older adults, spouses, adult children, and families evaluating thoughtful mobility support for everyday outdoor life.
core_selling_points:
- smooth dual-drive confidence
- steady outdoor support
- gentle starts and controlled turns
- comfort that helps more moments happen outside
use_scenarios:
- backyard path
- home ramp and porch exit
- quiet evening neighborhood route
visual_style: Warm, cinematic, realistic, portrait-first, restrained, mature American brand advertising.
style_tone: warm, credible, calm, cinematic, never melodramatic
consistency_anchor: Match the real AnyWell wheelchair shown in the white-background product photos. Preserve the exact frame silhouette, joystick, battery box, rear wheel hub design, caster springs, red mesh upper back panel, and foldable footplate structure.
additional_info: All scenes must feel newly generated and anonymous, but the wheelchair itself should match the real product from the white-background reference images as closely as possible. Do not reproduce any real customer, quote, house, unfinished ramp build, or woods footage.
music: Warm restrained cinematic underscore with light piano and gentle ambient texture.

concepts.title: Nature Within Reach
concepts.core_theme: Freedom returns through quiet outdoor exploration.
concepts.main_theme: Nature does not have to stay out of reach.
concepts.hook: Nature does not have to feel far away.
concepts.cta: Discover more thoughtful outdoor confidence with AnyWell.
concepts.visual_style: Morning woodland edge, soft movement, natural realism, faces never sharply hero-framed.
concepts.continuity_rider_anchor: Keep the same anonymous silver-haired older man and the same partner across all scenes. Wardrobe stays consistent, faces remain natural and not hyper-detailed.
concepts.use_scenarios:
- wooded backyard edge
- narrow garden path
- quiet overlook near trees
concepts.additional_info: The partner follows with affection, not as a caregiver stereotype. The tone is calm and dignified.

shots.scene_description: A silver-haired older man in a clean knit jacket sits in an anonymous powered wheelchair at the back doorway of a quiet American home. The camera observes from a respectful rear three-quarter angle as morning light opens onto a tree-lined path. His partner appears softly in the background, relaxed and smiling. Faces stay natural and not sharply featured.
shots.camera_movement: slow handheld-style dolly forward from the doorway into daylight, steady and calm
shots.lighting: soft morning natural light with gentle window spill and cool outdoor highlights
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait composition, rider centered low in frame, doorway and trees creating depth, no readable signage
shots.transition_anchor: end with the wheelchair rolling forward toward the outdoor path so the next shot can continue the same direction
shots.voiceover_en: Some paths feel closer the moment confidence returns.
shots.sfx: soft tire roll, birds in the distance

shots.scene_description: The same older man glides along a narrow wooded backyard path in the same anonymous powered wheelchair. The partner follows a few steps behind without touching the chair. The camera tracks beside the chair, showing steady outdoor motion, subtle texture in the wheels, and calm body posture. The frame feels cinematic and realistic, not glossy or synthetic.
shots.camera_movement: smooth side-follow tracking shot with subtle push-in as the chair settles into the route
shots.lighting: filtered daylight through trees with realistic contrast and soft shadows
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: mid portrait framing, path and trees wrapping around the chair, partner lightly out of focus behind
shots.transition_anchor: finish with forward motion continuing toward a brighter opening in the trees
shots.voiceover_en: A steady ride can make the outdoors feel welcoming again.
shots.key_message: Outdoor confidence can feel gentle and steady.
shots.sfx: soft gravel texture, leaves moving lightly

shots.scene_description: The route widens slightly. The same partner walks beside the wheelchair now, matching pace and glancing over with quiet warmth. The man keeps moving independently. The shot is intimate but restrained, prioritizing dignity, companionship, and motion through nature rather than dramatic emotion.
shots.camera_movement: front-side tracking shot moving backward smoothly as both subjects advance together
shots.lighting: neutral daylight with soft skin tone rolloff and realistic depth
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium-wide composition, both figures visible, trees and path framing the pair, anonymous home landscape
shots.transition_anchor: end with both looking ahead toward open space
shots.voiceover_en: Not to hold him back. Just to share the way forward.
shots.key_message: Companionship should support freedom, not replace it.
shots.sfx: light footsteps beside the chair, distant birds

shots.scene_description: The same couple pauses near a quiet clearing at the edge of the trees. The wheelchair comes to a gentle stop and both look outward, framed mostly from behind and in profile so no one becomes personally identifiable. The image holds on stillness, fresh air, and the feeling that dignity belongs outdoors too.
shots.camera_movement: gentle settling move into a wide portrait hero frame, then hold
shots.lighting: clean daylight with soft rim light on shoulders and wheelchair edges
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: wide portrait composition, wheelchair in the foreground, trees opening to sky, elegant negative space above
shots.transition_anchor: end on a quiet still frame suitable for logo or end card
shots.key_message: Dignity belongs in the world outside.
shots.sfx: gentle breeze and soft outdoor ambience
